message:
perf(search): pre-allocate HashMap/HashSet capacity in RRF fusion

Pre-allocate capacity for scores, hits, and seen_content collections
to avoid rehashing during insertions. Benchmarks show 18-25% improvement:

- rrf_fusion_100_results: 356µs → 292µs (-18%)
- rrf_fusion_50pct_overlap: 217µs → 162µs (-25%)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
